articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?

keyEvents.text: Goal! Grenada 1, Bahamas 0. Jermaine Francis (Grenada) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Regan Charles-Cook with a cross.
Goal! Grenada 2, Bahamas 0. Darius Johnson (Grenada) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Regan Charles-Cook following a fast break.
Goal! Grenada 3, Bahamas 0. Keishean Francois (Grenada) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Jermaine Francis with a headed pass.
Darius Johnson (Grenada) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Grenada. Zade Douglas replaces Keishean Francois.
Substitution, Grenada. Joshua Isaac replaces Regan Charles-Cook.
Substitution, Bahamas. Andre Roberts replaces Kevin Thomas.
Substitution, Bahamas. Reuben Edgecombe replaces Lamond Cross.
Goal! Grenada 4, Bahamas 0. Joshua Isaac (Grenada) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Zade Douglas with a cross.
Goal! Grenada 5, Bahamas 0. Kayden Harrack (Grenada) left footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Grenada. Vijay Valcin replaces Darius Johnson.
Substitution, Grenada. Ethan Telesford replaces Parish Muirhead.
Substitution, Bahamas. Omar Chemaly replaces Lance Carroll.
Substitution, Bahamas. Justin Minns replaces Nicolás López.
Substitution, Grenada. Saydrel Lewis replaces Jermaine Francis.
Substitution, Bahamas. Jack Massey replaces Andre Roberts because of an injury.
Goal! Grenada 6, Bahamas 0. Saydrel Lewis (Grenada) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Roman Charles-Cook.
